figure.title: UALink Switch Platform Architecture
figure.purpose: Illustrates the internal components of a UALink Switch Platform.

technical_summary: The Switch Platform is managed by a Processor running a Switch Mgmt Agent.
It contains a NIC, TPM, and BMC connected to the central Processor.
The Processor manages multiple Switch ASICs (two shown), which provide the external downstream ports.

components.name: Processor & Switch Mgmt Agent
components.description: Central control and management software host.

components.name: Switches
components.description: Hardware switching ASICs with external ports.

critical_facts: The Switch Platform integrates security (TPM) and management (BMC, Agent) directly with the switching hardware.
